pi_items.source: Task script setup_task.sh and verifier.py confirm this is the file modified and verified.

Downloaded SampleDivesV2.ssrf from the URL specified in install_subsurface.sh and counted <dive> XML tags. The file actually contains 29 dives, contradicting the metadata and the verifier's exact expectation.
Verifier script verifier.py extracts chronologically sorted dives[3] and dives[7] and checks if their parent is no longer a 'trip'.
Verifier script verifier.py extracts chronologically sorted dives[0] and dives[4] and checks if their parent is still a 'trip' to ensure other groupings were not destroyed.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the Subsurface dive log file at /home/ga/Documents/dives.ssrf. The underlying SampleDivesV2.ssrf file actually contains 29 dives from real-world dive logs, contradicting the metadata claim and verifier expectation of exactly 8 total dives. The verifier specifically targets chronological dive indices 3 (Dive #4) and 7 (Dive #8) to be standalone (removed from trips), while requiring dives at indices 0 (Dive #1) and 4 (Dive #5) to remain grouped in their respective trips.
